headline: Merger Value Hit a First-Half Record as Deal Sizes Grew
summary: Global merger activity reached a record $2.6 trillion in the first half of the year as companies pursued larger acquisitions, while analysts expect dealmaking to broaden into smaller companies.

raw.headline: Merger Value Hit a First-Half Record as Deal Sizes Grew

headline: The Portfolio That Could Put You in a New Car Every Year for Life
summary: The average new vehicle in the United States now costs roughly $49,000, with full-size pickups and many luxury models pushing far higher. That puts a quietly absurd idea within reach for people who think in terms of dividend income: building a portfolio that throws off enough cash every year to buy a new car without ... The Portfolio That Could Put You in a New Car Every Year for Life

headline: What Would It Take to Give Away 10% of Your Income Every Year?
summary: Most spending benefits the person doing the spending. Charitable giving is different. People give because they believe in a cause, want to help others, improve their community, honor a loved one, or simply because generosity brings satisfaction. Many religious traditions encourage giving as well. In the Judeo-Christian tradition, a 10% tithe has been a longstanding ... What Would It Take to Give Away 10% of Your Income Every Year?

headline: Can Partnerships and PPAs Continue to Power NextEra's Earnings Growth?
summary: NEE's long-term PPAs, renewable backlog and partnerships with Google Cloud and Meta strengthen earnings visibility as clean power demand rises.

headline: Dominion Energy (D) Stock Trades At A Discount Following Its 48% Run
summary: Dominion Energy stock is back in focus after a roughly 47.6% return over the past three years, with the market now weighing that strong performance against a valuation picture that screens as mixed rather than clearly cheap or clearly expensive. Over the last three years, Dominion Energy has delivered about 47.6% in total return, which puts extra attention on whether the recent share price fairly reflects the business outlook. The planned all stock acquisition by NextEra Energy and rising...

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in NextEra (NEE): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in NextEra (NEE). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Here’s What It Costs to Buy Back Your Fridays
summary: Most retirement calculators ask the wrong question. They assume the only goal is to stop working completely. Many workers would happily settle for something smaller: a three-day weekend, every week. For a worker earning roughly $80,000 a year, Fridays off are cumulatively worth about $16,000 annually. Replace that income and a five-day workweek becomes a ... Here’s What It Costs to Buy Back Your Fridays

headline: How to AI-Proof Your Fund Portfolio
summary: Most tech stocks are having another great year, leading to worries that market-tracking index funds are overvalued and far too concentrated. Here are five defensive sectors—and 13 funds—that can provide protection.
